{{Item
| name = 
| image = Frisbee.png
| id = frisbee
| type = Throwables
| Subtype = Dyeable
| stackable = 1
| Description = When dried: Brought to you by Canid.
When wet: Brought to you by Canid. (Eww)
}}

'''Frisbee''' is a dyeable throwable item that lets you play and interact with your doggo!

==Obtaining==
===Crafting===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!Recipe
|-
|Any Slabs
+ [[Throw Bone]]
|[[File:Frisbee crafting.gif]]
|}
==Usage==
<blockquote>
* Make sure your dog is in [[Basic Core Stats#Modes|DOCILE mode]], '''<code>Right click</code>''' in the distance to throw it, and watch as the dog fetches it and brings it back to you!

*It will be covered in dog drool, so you'll have to '''<code>Right click</code>''' to wipe it off before you can throw it again. <ref>https://doggytalents.fandom.com/wiki/List_of_Items_and_Equipment</ref></blockquote>
==Trivia==
*It was introduced in DTN 1.17.2. Texture made by Canid.
*It functions identically to the [[Throw Stick]] or [[Throw Bone]].
<references />

* It was showcased in a Youtube Shorts: "[https://www.youtube.com/shorts/GZhyGjDpek0 Hakachan use Fetch! It's super effective!]"
